global.description: The ad features a vibrant green background with a prominent logo and engaging text.
global.main_message: Encourages users to play and win rewards with friends.

elements.label: NeonArena logo
elements.description: A bold, stylized logo with the text 'NeonArena' prominently displayed at the top.

elements.label: Main headline
elements.description: A large, eye-catching headline that reads 'Win epic rewards' in a playful font.

elements.label: Body text
elements.description: A smaller text below the headline that says 'Play with friends tonight' in a clear, readable font.

elements.label: Call to action
elements.description: A prominent button at the bottom with the text 'Get offer' designed to attract user interaction.

elements.label: Top decorative element
elements.description: A small decorative element positioned at the top left, possibly a game-related icon.

elements.label: Top right icon
elements.description: A small icon located at the top right, adding visual interest to the ad.

elements.label: Center decorative element
elements.description: A small circular element located in the center, possibly a game feature or icon.

elements.label: Top small icon
elements.description: A tiny icon positioned near the top, contributing to the overall design.

elements.label: Center small icon
elements.description: A small icon located in the center area, enhancing the visual appeal.

elements.label: Top left small icon
elements.description: A small circular icon in the top left area, adding detail to the design.

elements.label: Center left small icon
elements.description: A small circular icon in the center left area, contributing to the overall layout.

elements.label: Background color
elements.description: A vibrant green background that sets a lively tone for the ad.
elements.text_content: Win epic rewards Play with friends tonight

elements.label: Top background element
elements.description: A subtle background element that complements the main logo and text.

elements.label: Footer text
elements.description: A smaller text at the bottom that encourages users with the phrase 'Get offer'.

embedding_texts.layout_text: The logo is at the top, followed by the headline and body text in the center, with a call to action at the bottom.
